title: cunila lyrata
intro: Cunila lyrata, also known as dwarf lavender or heartleaf, is a low-growing perennial herb native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of cunila lyrata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Cunila lyrata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
